title: gladiolus decaryi
intro: Gladiolus decaryi, also known as the Madagascar corn lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus decaryi include its ability to soothe irritated mucous membranes and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use by boiling its roots in water to create a decoction that can be consumed to alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions.
